reasoning: The market probability was 0.02 on November 27. As of December 7, ETH is priced at approximately $3,323. Throughout 2025, ETH's highest price has been around $4,215 (reached in August 2025, its highest since 2021). There have been no reported anomalous flash wicks reaching $7,000 on Binance's ETHUSDT pair this year. Given that only 24 days remain for Ethereum to effectively more than double in price (an increase of over 110%) to hit the $7,000 mark by December 31, 2025, the likelihood is exceptionally low. This aligns completely with the extremely low Polymarket valuation. I estimate the probability at the minimum allowable threshold of 0.02.
